basic_details.job_title: MIDHANI Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Medical Officer, Junior Nurse Posts
basic_details.organization_name: MIDHANI Primary Health Care Center Trust
basic_details.short_information: MIDHANI Primary Health Care Center Trust (MIDHANI) Medical Officer / Junior Nurse Notification 2026 has been released on 06 May 2026 on the official website. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the MIDHANI Medical Officer / Junior Nurse Recruitment 2026. Candidates with MBBS, B.Sc. Nursing, Post Basic B.Sc. Nursing, GNM, ANM, or Diploma in Emergency Medicine qualifications and within the maximum age limit of 65 years for Medical Officer and 30 years for Junior Nurse are eligible to apply for these Medical Officer / Junior Nurse vacancies. The walk-in interview process for MIDHAN

age_limit.age_details: Max 65 years for Medical Officer, Max 30 years for Junior Nurse.
age_limit.details: Maximum age limit for Medical Officer is 65 years. Maximum age limit for Junior Nurse is 30 years. Age relaxation details are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS, B.Sc. Nursing, Post Basic B.Sc. Nursing, General Nursing & Midwifery (GNM), Auxiliary Nurse Midwife (ANM), Diploma in Emergency Medicine
qualification.details: Medical Officer: MBBS with registration in any state or Indian National Medical Council with a minimum of 2 years post-MBBS registration experience in the relevant field in a Hospital/Clinic. Candidates should possess computer literacy skills. Junior Nurse: B.Sc. Nursing / Post Basic B.Sc. Nursing with a minimum of 1 year post-Nursing Council registration experience in a Hospital/Clinic. General Nursing & Midwifery (GNM) with a minimum of 2 years post-Nursing Council registration experience in a Hospital/Clinic. Auxiliary Nurse Midwife (ANM) / Diploma in Emergency Medicine with a minimum of 3 years post-Nursing Council registration experience in a Hospital/Clinic. Diploma in Emergency Medicine with a minimum of 3 years post Para Medical Board registration experience in a Hospital/Clinic. The candidate should possess valid/active registration with the State or National Nursing Council or relevant Para Medical Board, as applicable.

selection_process: Written Test Proficiency / Trade Test / Interview

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for MIDHANI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in dates are 14th May 2026 for Medical Officer and 15th May 2026 for Junior Nurse. The cut-off date for eligibility criteria is 6th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies announced by MIDHANI?
faq.answer: MIDHANI has announced a total of 2 vacancies for the posts of Medical Officer and Junior Nurse through this walk-in recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What are the minimum qualifications required for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: For the Medical Officer post, candidates must have an MBBS degree with registration and at least 2 years of post-MBBS experience in a relevant field.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications for the Junior Nurse position?
faq.answer: The Junior Nurse position requires B.Sc. Nursing, Post Basic B.Sc. Nursing, GNM, ANM, or a Diploma in Emergency Medicine, along with relevant post-qualification experience.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for MIDHANI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for the Junior Nurse post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Nurse post is 30 years.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for these positions?
faq.answer: The salary for both Medical Officer and Junior Nurse posts ranges from Rs.29,480/- to Rs.61,640/- per month.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for MIDHANI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Written Test followed by a Proficiency/Trade Test and/or Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview for MIDHANI Recruitment 2026 going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interviews will be held at the MIDHANI Primary Health Care Center Trust in Hyderabad, Telangana (Pincode: 500058).

faq.question: Q10. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates if applicable.
